person

Jessica Kandel

A doctor and surviving scientist involved in the nationwide effort to create a broad-spectrum antiviral.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Antiviral effort

Kandel's role connects scientific work established in the first game with The Division 2's missions to recover antivirals, a perfusion bioreactor and specialist support. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The official recap identifies Jessica Kandel as a doctor and one of the surviving scientists working after the outbreak. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Kandel is involved in creating a broad-spectrum antiviral alongside other surviving virologists and scientists. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Specific laboratory work and dialogue require direct mission or collectible evidence.
